race.comment: Tough contest with plenty of chances. IN A TIZZY (8) was well in commission at debut when raced handy for a plugging fifth over 1200m at Rosehill. Maps well again and with natural improvement can finish in the top three. ABOVE THE LAW (1) resumes from a lengthy spell. Finished runner-up at three of his four starts and gets every chance with the two trials. Can shoulder the 61kg and get off the mark. LUPA CAPITOLINA (13) Almanzor filly back for her second campaign. Returns with the two trials and no shock to see her closing late at the each-way odds. DWIGHT (2) covered plenty of ground at his second race start with a courageous second over 1200m at Wyong. Drawn out again and sure to close off late.
